themes.name: Classique Spotify
themes.author: Miaou
themes.desc: Le thème vert iconique original de Spotify.

themes.name: Rouge SpotiMeoww
themes.author: Miaou
themes.desc: Le thème rouge vif par défaut de SpotiMeoww.

themes.name: Dracula
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Un thème sombre avec des accents roses et violets inspiré par le fameux thème Dracula.
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #282a36 !important; } .Root__nav-bar { background: #1e1f29 !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(40, 42, 54, 0.95) !important; border-color: rgba(255, 121, 198, 0.3) !important; } span, div, h1, h2, h3 { color: #f8f8f2 !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #6272a4 !important; } div[data-testid=tracklist-row]:active { background: rgba(98, 114, 164, 0.3) !important; }

themes.name: Cyberpunk Neon
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Plongez dans le futur avec ce thème Cyberpunk jaune néon et cyan foncé.
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #0b0c10 !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(11, 12, 16, 0.95) !important; border: 1px solid #00f0ff !important; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2); } button[data-testid=play-button] { background-color: #fcee0a !important; } button[data-testid=play-button] * { fill: #000 !important; } span, h1, h2 { color: #00f0ff !important; text-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,240,255,0.5) !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #c5c6c7 !important; }

themes.name: Discord Blurple
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Un thème relaxant utilisant les couleurs de Discord.
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #36393f !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(47, 49, 54, 0.95) !important; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05) !important; } .Root__nav-bar { background: #2f3136 !important; } span, div, h1, h2 { color: #dcddde !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #8e9297 !important; } form[role=search] input { background-color: #202225 !important; border: none !important; }

themes.name: Sakura Pink
themes.author: Community
themes.desc: Un thème doux et rose inspiré des cerisiers en fleurs (Sakura).
themes.css: body, html, #main-view { background-color: #2a1b21 !important; } aside[data-testid=now-playing-bar] { background: rgba(42, 27, 33, 0.95) !important; border-color: rgba(255,183,197,0.3) !important; } span, div, h1, h2, h3 { color: #ffe6eb !important; } .encore-text-body-small { color: #ffb7c5 !important; }

extensions.name: Glow sur les Paroles
extensions.author: Community
extensions.desc: Ajoute un effet de brillance dynamique sur les paroles lorsqu'elles défilent.
extensions.js: let s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent='div[data-testid=lyrics-fullscreen-container] span.lyrics-line-active { text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--theme-color), 0 0 20px var(--theme-color); transition: text-shadow 0.3s ease; }';document.head.appendChild(s);

extensions.name: Pochettes Circulaires
extensions.author: Miaou
extensions.desc: Transforme toutes les pochettes d'albums en cercles.
